howItWorks.title: How This Capify Alternative Makes Lyric Videos

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. Try LyricVideoMaker with the same song you used in Capify and compare the results.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. AI also reads the song's mood to generate matching visuals.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Compare the preview quality, lyric accuracy, and visual feel against Capify. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Test Your Lyric Video on LyricVideoMaker
whyChoose.description: If you are comparing Capify with another lyric video maker, the best test is the same song. LyricVideoMaker focuses on the parts that decide whether the result works: lyric accuracy, beat timing, readable layout, and visuals that fit the track.

highlight.title: AI transcription + visuals, not just text on video
highlight.description: LyricVideoMaker transcribes lyrics automatically, syncs them to the beat, and generates visuals driven by the song's mood. You don't type lyrics or pick templates — upload a song and get a finished video.

cards.title: Compare from the same audio
cards.description: Use the exact track you already tested elsewhere, then judge the transcript, timing, and visual direction side by side.

cards.title: Mood visuals are part of the workflow
cards.description: LyricVideoMaker treats visuals as part of the song interpretation, not just a background layer behind text.

cards.title: Readable lyrics stay the benchmark
cards.description: The result is judged by whether fans can follow the words clearly across the moments that matter: verse, hook, chorus, and ending.

items.question: Is LyricVideoMaker free as a Capify alternative?
items.answer: Yes. LyricVideoMaker is free to use as a Capify alternative — free credits to start, export included, no subscription or credit card.

items.question: How is LyricVideoMaker different from Capify?
items.answer: LyricVideoMaker auto-transcribes lyrics from audio, syncs every line to the beat, generates mood-driven AI visuals, and exports in multiple formats — all from one upload.

items.question: Do I need to type lyrics like in Capify?
items.answer: No — unlike a type-it-yourself workflow, AI transcribes every lyric line from your audio in 50+ languages. You only review and edit.

items.question: Can I export for TikTok and YouTube?
items.answer: Yes. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. All formats from one upload.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes. Your exports are yours to monetize and release — the same freedom you'd expect from Capify. Just make sure you have the rights to the music you upload.

items.question: How hard is it to switch from Capify?
items.answer: There's nothing to migrate. Upload the same song you used in Capify and you'll have a finished lyric video in a couple of minutes — no project files to move, no setup.
